title: uragoga phyllocalymma
intro: Uragoga phyllocalymma, also known as U. phyllocalymma, is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae. The medicinal properties of Uragoga phyllocalymma have been found to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which can help in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Uragoga phyllocalymma can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
